info.name: ESS Portal - Full API
info.description:
Complete Employee Self-Service portal API — every endpoint (GET/POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE), organized by folder.

Usage:
1. Set {{baseUrl}} (live or http://localhost:3000).
2. Run Auth > Login and copy accessToken into the {{token}} variable.
3. Protected requests use Bearer {{token}} automatically.
Replace path params like :id, :requestNo, :refNumber with real values.
